TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Falangaw = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Falangaw. 1,382 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 4,212 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 731 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 3,481 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis12%, Paiwan2%, Bunun1%, Rukai1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Ga kmlawa kika klegan seejiq Pey-nan ka seejiq Amis na Ma-ran se, gaga klwaun klegan seejiq Pey-nan. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung paru alang Tay-tung cung-sin ri. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Tay-pey>kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-ryo-taw>Seng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru >Tay 1>Cyo-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Ta-he ru>C-pen ru>Hwa-tung hay-an kung-ru>Cung-hwa ru>Cung-sing ru>dhuq. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni kari Tlu ni Klmukan. Pnyahan alang Mniq saw seejiq Amis ni duma na seejiq tnpusu seejiq o ruwan kari Falangau kika paru alang Tay-tung ksun. Gaga klwaun klegan seejiq Pey-nan ka Ma-ran se siida, kmlawa seejiq Pey-nan ka ga nniqan hiya seejiq Amis, mqraqil bi ka kndsan dha siida. Asi dhuq saw ma-ran se o kingal niqan bi biyax seejiq"Ma-han-han " miyah do, kika tduwa bi angal burux ka alang dha. Siida o Ri-cya se na seejiq Pey-nan knteetu mnrmuxan Ma-ran, kika bukuy Ma-ran o yasa ini baka biyax do huqil ruwan tjiyal uri da, bukuy kndadax Ma-han-han ka lutuc, kika angal dha tjiyal da.
S.PHON: = *alaŇčaw = gaga mniq tajtuŇč tajtuŇčsu ka alaŇč *alaŇčaw. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, …ĺukai*%, pujuma*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ga kmlawa kika kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka s…ô…ô…üiq amis na ma-…ĺan s…ô, gaga klwaun kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan. nniqan alaŇč njusan taj-tuŇč pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč ¶uŇč-sin …ĺi. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: taj-p…ô>kwo-taw * ńßaw>nan- ¶ow ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw>s…ôŇč-…ĺi …ĺu>ta-tuŇč …ĺu>piŇč-…ô…ĺ kuŇč-…ĺu >taj *> ¶jo- ¶waŇč …ĺu>nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu>ta-ńß…ô …ĺu> ¶-p…ôn …ĺu>ńßwa-tuŇč ńßaj-an kuŇč-…ĺu> ¶uŇč-ńßwa …ĺu> ¶uŇč-siŇč …ĺu>dńßuq. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni ka…ĺi tlu ni klmukan. pnjańßan alaŇč mniq saw s…ô…ô…üiq amis ni duma na s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o …ĺuwan ka…ĺi *alaŇčau kika pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč ksun. gaga klwaun kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka ma-…ĺan s…ô siida, kmlawa s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka ga nniqan ńßija s…ô…ô…üiq amis, mq…ĺaqil bi ka kndsan dńßa siida. asi dńßuq saw ma-…ĺan s…ô o kiŇčal niqan bi bijax s…ô…ô…üiq"ma-ńßan-ńßan " mijańß do, kika tduwa bi aŇčal bu…ĺux ka alaŇč dńßa. siida o …ĺi- ¶ja s…ô na s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan knt…ô…ôtu mn…ĺmuxan ma-…ĺan, kika bukuj ma-…ĺan o jasa ini baka bijax do ńßuqil …ĺuwan t…üijal u…ĺi da, bukuj kndadax ma-ńßan-ńßan ka lutu ¶, kika aŇčal dńßa t…üijal da.
S.FORM: = Falangaw = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Falangaw. 1,382 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 4,212 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 731 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 3,481 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis12%, Paiwan2%, Bunun1%, Rukai1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Ga kmlawa kika klegan seejiq Pey-nan ka seejiq Amis na Ma-ran se, gaga klwaun klegan seejiq Pey-nan. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung paru alang Tay-tung cung-sin ri. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Tay-pey>kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-ryo-taw>Seng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru >Tay 1>Cyo-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Ta-he ru>C-pen ru>Hwa-tung hay-an kung-ru>Cung-hwa ru>Cung-sing ru>dhuq. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni kari Tlu ni Klmukan. Pnyahan alang Mniq saw seejiq Amis ni duma na seejiq tnpusu seejiq o ruwan kari Falangau kika paru alang Tay-tung ksun. Gaga klwaun klegan seejiq Pey-nan ka Ma-ran se siida, kmlawa seejiq Pey-nan ka ga nniqan hiya seejiq Amis, mqraqil bi ka kndsan dha siida. Asi dhuq saw ma-ran se o kingal niqan bi biyax seejiq"Ma-han-han " miyah do, kika tduwa bi angal burux ka alang dha. Siida o Ri-cya se na seejiq Pey-nan knteetu mnrmuxan Ma-ran, kika bukuy Ma-ran o yasa ini baka biyax do huqil ruwan tjiyal uri da, bukuy kndadax Ma-han-han ka lutuc, kika angal dha tjiyal da.
S.PHON: = *alaŇčaw = gaga mniq tajtuŇč tajtuŇčsu ka alaŇč *alaŇčaw. *,*** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, …ĺukai*%, pujuma*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ga kmlawa kika kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka s…ô…ô…üiq amis na ma-…ĺan s…ô, gaga klwaun kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan. nniqan alaŇč njusan taj-tuŇč pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč ¶uŇč-sin …ĺi. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: taj-p…ô>kwo-taw * ńßaw>nan- ¶ow ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw>s…ôŇč-…ĺi …ĺu>ta-tuŇč …ĺu>piŇč-…ô…ĺ kuŇč-…ĺu >taj *> ¶jo- ¶waŇč …ĺu>nan-ńßw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu>ta-ńß…ô …ĺu> ¶-p…ôn …ĺu>ńßwa-tuŇč ńßaj-an kuŇč-…ĺu> ¶uŇč-ńßwa …ĺu> ¶uŇč-siŇč …ĺu>dńßuq. pusu klgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni ka…ĺi tlu ni klmukan. pnjańßan alaŇč mniq saw s…ô…ô…üiq amis ni duma na s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o …ĺuwan ka…ĺi *alaŇčau kika pa…ĺu alaŇč taj-tuŇč ksun. gaga klwaun kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka ma-…ĺan s…ô siida, kmlawa s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan ka ga nniqan ńßija s…ô…ô…üiq amis, mq…ĺaqil bi ka kndsan dńßa siida. asi dńßuq saw ma-…ĺan s…ô o kiŇčal niqan bi bijax s…ô…ô…üiq"ma-ńßan-ńßan " mijańß do, kika tduwa bi aŇčal bu…ĺux ka alaŇč dńßa. siida o …ĺi- ¶ja s…ô na s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan knt…ô…ôtu mn…ĺmuxan ma-…ĺan, kika bukuj ma-…ĺan o jasa ini baka bijax do ńßuqil …ĺuwan t…üijal u…ĺi da, bukuj kndadax ma-ńßan-ńßan ka lutu ¶, kika aŇčal dńßa t…üijal da.
